note: existingSiteUrl confirmed 2026-07-18 (was a placeholder before). lftlr.html does not fetch this file — its CTA button links directly to existingSiteUrl in the HTML. Episodes and Timeline sections were removed from lftlr.html at launch (2026-07-18): no real content existed for them, and fabricating one would have contradicted the go-live requirement not to invent details. featuredArtists/gallery here are also unused by the page currently (it uses real photos directly from assets/images/work/lftlr/ instead) — kept as an option if the page is ever restructured to be JSON-driven like work.json/team.json.
